s1_counter_the_bomb.correct_line: decline the Gray Ogre, counter the Shivan Dragon

s2_hold_the_wipe.correct_line: pass turn 1, wipe 4 creatures on turn 2 instead of 2

s3_bolt_the_threat.correct_line: hold the bolt for the Lieutenant; kill it before it leaves 3-damage range

s4_race_vs_block.correct_line: attack with the two fliers only; hold both ground creatures as blockers

s5_hold_up_quench.correct_line: pass the main phase holding 1U; counter the tapped-out Craw Wurm
